name: First Choice Financial
description_short: First Choice Credit Union is a Florida-based credit union founded in 1929, offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and debit card services to members in Palm Beach County.
description_long:
First Choice Credit Union (FCCU) was established on September 29, 1929, originally as the Palm Beach County Postal Credit Union, making it the first credit union in Palm Beach County. It was chartered as a state credit union in Florida with a foundational mission to provide affordable financial services, fair lending rates, and democratic member control over resources to improve members' economic and social conditions.

FCCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking and lending products. These include checking and savings accounts (Value Checking), auto loans with prequalification, home equity loans and HELOCs, mortgage services through a partnership with US Mortgage of Florida, personal loans, debit cards with a round-up savings feature (10% APY), credit cards, non-primary residence loans for second homes and investment properties, early direct deposit access (up to 2 days early), and online/mobile banking through their home banking platform. They also provide video banking appointments and check ordering services.

FCCU distinguishes itself through member-focused benefits including lower overdraft fees, a "best value guarantee" on loan rates, and innovative savings tools like their Debit Card Round-Up feature offering 10% APY on rounded-up transactions. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, they operate on a member-owned cooperative model. They actively encourage member referrals and community engagement through testimonials and Google reviews.

As a regional credit union, FCCU's primary limitation is geographic—membership and services are primarily available to those in or connected to Palm Beach County, Florida. While they offer competitive rates and personalized service typical of credit unions, their product range and technological sophistication may not match larger national banks or fintech alternatives. Their mortgage services are outsourced to a third party, which may require additional coordination.
services: Savings accounts with Debit Card Round-Up (10% APY)
Mortgage services (through US Mortgage of Florida partnership)
pros: 10% APY on Debit Card Round-Up savings feature, significantly above typical savings rates
Early direct deposit access up to 2 days before scheduled payday
Lower overdraft fees compared to traditional banks
95+ year history as first credit union in Palm Beach County, established 1929
Member-owned cooperative structure with democratic governance
Non-Primary Residence Loan specifically designed for second homes and investment properties
cons: Geographic limitation: primarily serves Palm Beach County, Florida area only
Mortgage services outsourced to third-party provider (US Mortgage of Florida), requiring external coordination
Website does not display specific interest rates, APRs, or loan terms—members must apply or contact to compare
Limited information on mobile app functionality, deposit insurance coverage specifics, or fee schedules
No mention of business banking services, despite being a credit union that could offer them
best_for: Palm Beach County residents and employees seeking member-owned banking with personalized service
Homeowners interested in home equity loans, HELOCs, or refinancing second properties
Savers looking for high-yield savings options through the Debit Card Round-Up feature
diagnosis: First Choice Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members in Palm Beach County seeking traditional banking services with credit union member benefits, competitive rates, and personalized service. The main caveat is geographic restriction to the Palm Beach County area and the need to contact the credit union directly for specific rates and terms, as detailed pricing information is not published on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: First Choice Financial — NCUA-insured credit union in Gloversville, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
